MAP.COMMENT: Map StatusHistoryRequest to XLink Canonical Request
Get startDesc, startDate. Also format startDate
Get newDesc, newDate. Also format newDate

BRANCH.COMMENT: If statusDescriptions are equal, then check for the corresponding dates.
Check if dateTime difference is greater than 1 minute

SEQUENCE.NAME: %dateDifferenceSec%>60
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Add the newDesc, newDate to Response

MAP.COMMENT: Map startDate, newDate, startDesc, newDesc to Response. Also, overwrite startDesc & startDate with newDesc & newDate respectively
Map startDate, newDate, startDesc, newDesc to Response. Also, overwrite startDesc & startDate with newDesc & newDate respectively

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Add the newDesc, newDate to the previous document in the Response

MAP.COMMENT: Map startDate, newDate, startDesc, newDesc to Response. Also, overwrite startDesc & startDate with newDesc & newDate respectively
Map startDate, newDate, startDesc, newDesc to Response. Also, overwrite startDesc & startDate with newDesc & newDate respectively
Map startDate, newDate, startDesc, newDesc to Response. Also, overwrite startDesc & startDate with newDesc & newDate respectively
Map startDate, newDate, startDesc, newDesc to Response. Also, overwrite startDesc & startDate with newDesc & newDate respectively
